THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: - JUDGMENT FOR FORECLOSURE OF MECHANICS LIEN ON STIPULATION OF PARTIES - 1) JUAN PEREZ DBA PEREZ CONSTRUCTION HAS PERFECTED MECHANICS LIEN ON THE WHOLE. SAID MECHANICS LIEN IS IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $70,000.00 AND ACCRUED INTEREST FOF 10% FROM 5/27/03 AND OWING TO PLAINTIFF. 2) PEREZ SHALL BE PREMITTED TO FORECLOSE ON SAID MECHANICS LIEN AND SUBJECT PROPERTY MAY BE SOLD AT PUBLIC AUCTION. 3) SHERIFF IS ORDERED TO EXEC;UTE A DEED TO THE SUBJECT PROPERTY IN FAVOR OF THE PURCHASER OF SUBJECT PROPERTY AT SHERIFF'S SALE AND PROCEEDS SHALL BE APPLIED FIRST TO THE SHERIFF'S COST OF SALE, INCLUDING FEES, DIBUSEMENTS AND COMMISSIONS, AND THEN TO PLAINTIFF OFR ALL AMOUNTS DUE TO PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO JUDGMENT, INCLUDING INTEREST, AND COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER TERMS.
